subcodes.title: MOLITVA  ZA  BALKAN
subcodes.first_line:
## MOLITVA  ZA  BALKAN

O Ti Plemeniti, Svemogući , pred tronom milosrđa  preklinjemo Te za milost za naše grehe; milost
subcodes.notes: Source unconfirmed. Serbian prayer for the Balkans (Molitva za Balkan). Content resembles PUP-era talks on the Balkans war (cf. ABU0336 PUP#119) but exact source not found in any authenticated text. Assigned XAB pending identification.
